postconditions: result == (observed_address_code == ICP_QUERY_PRECOMPILE_ADDRESS_CODE && (outcome == ICP_QUERY_OUTCOME_RETURN || outcome == ICP_QUERY_OUTCOME_OOG || outcome == ICP_QUERY_OUTCOME_OTHER_FAILURE) && (input_len > MAX_ICP_QUERY_COMBINED_LEN_WITH_EXACT_GAS || reply_len > MAX_ICP_QUERY_COMBINED_LEN_WITH_EXACT_GAS || charged_gas >= ICP_QUERY_BASE_GAS + input_len * ICP_QUERY_INPUT_BYTE_GAS + reply_len * ICP_QUERY_REPLY_BYTE_GAS) && (outcome != ICP_QUERY_OUTCOME_RETURN || gas_limit >= charged_gas) && (outcome != ICP_QUERY_OUTCOME_OOG || gas_limit < charged_gas))
acceptance_criteria: Require the ICP query precompile address, a known return/OOG/other-failure outcome, exact byte gas lower bound in the conservative non-overflow range, and OOG-only gas-limit split.

test_evidence.test_name: verified-core ICP query gas observation PBT
